info.title: GoCreate API Help Page
info.description:
**This API exposes core commerce data for B2B clients, providing visibility into products, pricing, inventory, and operational status. It is optimized for client-facing applications that require secure, reliable, and consistent data access.**

**Data Retention Policy:** Starting January 14, 2026, we will provide order details for ongoing orders. After an order is delivered, its details will remain available only for 4 weeks.

post.description: This endpoint validates requested customer id, and provide orders of specific customer.
This endpoint validates request and provide orders by created or changed date.
This endpoint validates request and provide orders by created date.
This endpoint validates requested order number, and provide information according to the parameters.
This endpoint validates requested order number and provide delivery information.
This endpoint validates request, and provide delivery information of orders in the given status.
This endpoint validates request, and provide Pricing information of given orders.
This endpoint validates request, destination status and update the order status.
Adds a new customer with the provided details.
This endpoint validates the search parameters provided in the request and retrieves matching customer records by customer ID.
This endpoint validates the date provided in the request and retrieves matching customer with created date.
This endpoint validates the date provided in the request and retrieves matching customer between created date range.

This endpoint validates the search parameters provided in the request and retrieves matching customer records. It supports filtering by multiple attributes such as customer number, name, address, and other identifiers.
This endpoint validates the incoming request parameters and returns accurate, structured basic fabric information.
This endpoint validates the incoming request parameters and returns accurate, structured fabric information.
This endpoint validates the incoming request parameters and returns accurate, structured lining information.
